data.description: Iran's Araghchi: If final negotiation stage completed, agreement will be signed remotely by both sides and announced

data.title: Village Super Market, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On June 12, 2026, the Board of Directors of Village Super Market, Inc. (NSD:VLGEA) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per Class A common share and $0.1625 per Class B common share. Shareholders of record on July 2, 2026, will receive the dividends, which are scheduled to be paid on July 23, 2026.

data.title: DIAGNOS Announces Grant of Stock Options and Adoption of Semi-Annual Reporting
data.description: In BROSSARD, Quebec, on June 12, 2026, Diagnos Inc. (DIAGNOS) revealed a corporate update. The company, listed on TSX Venture under ADK, OTCQB under DGNOF, and FWB under 4D4A, specializes in utilizing Artificial Intelligence (AI) for early identification of eye-related health issues. In a recent development, DIAGNOS disclosed the granting of a total of 1,500,000 stock options to directors and officers within the organization.

data.title: TotalTek Hosts Annual Golf Charity Event to Benefit Operation Veteran Success
data.description: On June 22, an event will be held at the Grand Geneva Resort & Spa in Lake Geneva, Wisconsin to raise funds for emergency housing assistance for veterans. TotalTek, an enterprise technology and engineering company, is organizing the event. The 2026 Annual Golf Charity Event is scheduled for June 22, 2026. The purpose of the event is to raise funds for this cause.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Climbs 400 Points On Iran Deal Hopes; SpaceX Rockets Higher (Live Coverage)
data.description: The Dow Jones index experienced a notable increase on Friday due to optimism surrounding a potential peace deal between the U.S. and Iran. SpaceX saw a significant surge in its stock price during its debut in the market, while the satellite company faced a sharp decline. The Dow climbed by around 400 points as investors focused on the possibilities of a resolution between the two nations.

data.title: ADAMnetworks Appoints Philippe Johnston as Field CIO and Strategic Advisor
data.description: In Ottawa, Canada, Philippe Johnston has been appointed as the Field Chief Information Officer and Strategic Advisor for ADAMnetworks, tasked with spearheading the company's expansion and advancement.

data.title: PowerA and Meridian GMT Announce Strategic Partnership at FlightSimExpo 2026
data.description: The launch of the "Fueled by PowerA" program is set to revolutionize flight simulation experiences for gamers around the globe. Led by PowerA, a top-notch provider of gaming accessories, in collaboration with Meridian GMT, renowned for their advanced flight simulation hardware, this initiative aims to reach a wider audience. The program was announced on June 12, 2026, in Woodinville, Washington. This partnership is expected to enhance the experience for a significant number of players, bringing cutting-edge technology and realism to the world of flight simulation.

data.title: Solana's RSI at 33.72 & 77.5% long positions set up oversold bounce for $75 target in 2 weeks post $68.80 resistance breakout.
data.description: With Solana's Relative Strength Index (RSI) dropping to 33.72, institutional traders are maintaining 77.5% long positions, indicating a classic oversold bounce opportunity. This setup aims for a price target of $75, with the trigger for this scenario being a breakthrough above the $68.80 resistance level.

data.title: ADA's price to bounce to $0.185 before falling to $0.125, as RSI hits 29 and smart money goes 70.8% long.
data.description: ADA is showing signs of a potential relief rally with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) hitting a low of 29. Smart money is heavily investing in the cryptocurrency, with a long position of 70.8%. It is anticipated that ADA could experience a 10-12% increase, reaching $0.185 before continuing its downward trend towards $0.125.

data.title: XRP price may drop to $0.95 in 48 hours due to death cross and high long positions. Failed bounce at $1.13 signals distribution phase.
data.description: The recent technical analysis of XRP shows a significant drop below important moving averages, along with a high long position of 76%. This situation indicates a potential rapid decline in price to $0.95. The failed recovery at $1.13 further confirms the current distribution phase of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: BNB price could hit $650 in 7-14 days before dropping to $520 by month-end, despite bullish sentiment.
data.description: Despite the bullish sentiment surrounding BNB's current rally, smart money is positioning defensively, indicating a lack of conviction. Experts predict a target price of $650 within the next 7-14 days, but anticipate a drop to $520 by the end of the month due to structural weaknesses.

data.title: ETH may retest $1,400 before a $2,000 recovery by Q3 2026. Ethereum at $1,660, with 65% chance of hitting $1,400. Bullish sentiment prevails.
data.description: Ethereum is currently priced at $1,660 and is nearing an oversold state, with technical indicators suggesting a possible capitulation. Despite this, smart money investors are notably optimistic. There is a 65% likelihood that Ethereum could reach $1,400 in the near future.

data.title: BTC may hit $70K by July 4th with 65% likelihood. Oversold RSI at 32 triggers a potential rally. Resistance at $64,700 crucial for the surge.
data.description: With Bitcoin currently showing an oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 32 and compressed Bollinger Bands, there is a strong indication of a reversal setup. This setup is pointing towards a potential target of $70,000 within the next three weeks. However, the key factor for Bitcoin's upward movement will be breaking through the resistance level at $64,700 with conviction.

data.description: In Somerset, New Jersey on June 12, 2026, Joseph, a military veteran battling prostate cancer, marked a significant moment as the 8,000th patient at the ProCure Proton Therapy Center. data.title: SpaceX Holds Most IPO Gains; It's Already The Sixth-Largest Company
data.description: A substantial amount of $75 billion has been raised, surpassing the total funds raised by all Initial Public Offerings (IPOs) worldwide in the current year. SpaceX has seen the highest gains from its IPO, propelling it to become the sixth-largest company globally. This demonstrates significant financial success for the company and showcases its growth potential in the market.
